name: Auto DEVLOG & Time Tracker
description: Automatically updates DEVLOG.md and spec files with detailed time tracking, struggles, and refactorings after each task session

action.message:
📝 **AUTO-DEVLOG UPDATE**

Task session completed! Please update documentation with detailed tracking:

**Update DEVLOG.md:**
- Add current task details to appropriate spec section
- Include actual time spent vs estimate
- Document all Kiro commands used with counts and purposes
- List all files modified/created (highlight NEW and CRITICAL FIX items)
- Detail any struggles, debugging processes, configuration issues
- Explain root causes and solutions for problems encountered
- Update Kiro CLI Usage Statistics table
- Update Total Time Tracking table with variance analysis

**Update Spec Files:**
- Add Time Tracking section to tasks.md with variance explanation
- Add Lessons Learned section documenting critical issues and insights
- Update requirements.md and design.md with time tracking and key learnings

**Documentation Style:**
- Use emojis for organization (🚨🔧📊🧪✅❌)
- Bold important concepts and file names
- Include specific error messages, file paths, configuration changes
- Write like an engineering journal showing the debugging journey
- Focus on helping future developers avoid similar issues

**Make it comprehensive** - capture not just what was built, but HOW it was built, what problems were encountered, and what was learned. Include the struggles and refactorings to reflect the real development process!
